calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:50am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance by Respondent Karina Roberts, Appellant, Levon Israelyan, appears through counsel Emmanuel Enyinwa. Daniel Israelyan, son, appears to translate Russian for Levon Israelyan. Mr. Enyinwa, presents case in chief, in the narrative.
No new exhibits were identified or retained.
10:20am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Judgment Entered
